description: Letter fragment from ʿAlāʾim bt. Bar[akāt?] to her daughter Umm al-ʿIzz bt. Thābit al-Ṭabīb known as Ibn Abī l-Ḥaqq (or al-Ḥasan?) al-Maghribī, probably the wife of [...] b. Mūsā Majjānī. In Judaeo-Arabic. The mother reproaches her daughter for neglecting her all these years. (Information in part from Goitein's index cards and notes linked below.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
